description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, urban design. The front facade features large, black-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows, with a prominent bay window section on one side. The main entryway includes a dark-colored door with glass panels and a matching garage door, both set into the brickwork. The house has a simple, rectangular footprint with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The rear and side walls are plain, with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and security. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms separated by white partition walls.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a prominent bay window on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, garage door, large windows, and bay window feature.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain brick wall and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long, uninterrupted brick wall and the bay window section extending from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain brick wall and a glimpse of the bay window at the front corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a modern glass-paneled door, no porch or steps, and a matching garage door.
